title: The MHCII Immune Activation Score predicts risk of recurrence and benefit of taxanes in Basal-like and HER2-enriched breast cancer.
abstract: There are no clinically validated biomarkers to assess recurrence risk and guide treatment de-escalation in Basal-like and HER2-enriched breast cancer. Taxane-based chemotherapy remains a cornerstone of treatment despite significant toxicity. We evaluated the prognostic and predictive utility of the MHCII Immune Activation Score (IA Score) in these subtypes.
